D:\Softwares\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\eniac_opengl.dir/objects.a
D:\Softwares\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\eniac_opengl.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\eniac_opengl.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Softwares\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\eniac_opengl.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o eniac_opengl.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libeniac_opengl.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\eniac_opengl.dir\linkLibs.rsp
